title: 3D Seeds
description: Gives Seeds 3D models in which they are in small bundles.
body:
This resourcepack adds 3D models for these items:
- **Wheat Seeds**
- **Beetroot Seeds**
- **Pumpkin Seeds**
- **Melon Seeds**
- **Torchflower Seeds**
- **Pitcher Pod**

They are all inside of small bundles which have an icon of the crop they grow into.

**In game look:**
  
![Seeds in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/baa3fcbad0e69ff3bb95877a9c951378e99f8e64.png)
